_comment: Pairs trading — 5-min native resolution, matching run_pipeline(df_prices) backtest exactly.
name: Pairs_5min
_tf_comment: null = native 5-min bars, matching RESAMPLE_TF=None in the backtest.
_lookback_comment: Must cover zscore_window + warmup. Base class fetches lookback * 2 raw bars, so 600 gives ~1200 bars headroom.
_zscore_comment: Must match ROLLING_WINDOW=500 from the backtest pipeline exactly.
_z_comment: entry/exit/stop match ENTRY_Z=2.0, EXIT_Z=0.5, STOP_Z=3.5 from the backtest.
_poll_comment: Poll every 30s — allocator fires on PENDING intents, so we emit ~every 5-min bar boundary.
_pairs_comment: Beta/alpha from walk-forward OLS fit on TRAIN set (5-min log prices, Oct 2025 - Jan 2026). Re-fit monthly.

pairs._note: Sharpe 3.11 OOS | half-life 353 bars (~29h) | no strong economic link — monitor closely
Sharpe 3.01 OOS | half-life 583 bars (~49h) | cleanest pair, max DD only 3.7%

Sharpe 2.86 OOS | half-life 622 bars (~52h) | LINK/SOL DeFi/L1 relationship
